title: Garlicky Light Algerian Hazelnuts Tagine
description: A fragrant, garlic‑rich one‑pot tagine bursting with toasted hazelnuts, tender chickpeas, and sweet carrots, finished with a splash of lemon and fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a tagine or heavy‑bottom pot over medium heat.
Add minced garlic, diced onion, and sliced carrot; sauté until onion translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in cumin, coriander, paprika, and cinnamon; cook for 1 minute to bloom spices.
Add drained chickpeas and vegetable stock; bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the tagine simmers, toast hazelnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 5 minutes; set aside.
After 15 minutes, stir in the toasted hazelnuts and lemon juice; season with salt and pepper.
Simmer uncovered for another 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Remove from heat and sprinkle chopped parsley over the top.
Serve hot with a side of crusty whole‑grain bread or couscous.
